title: 10 best herbal teas for dark lips
description: Rosmarinus officinalis, also known as rosemary, teas helps with dark lips because of its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb's essential oils and polyphenols work to reduce inflammation and promote healthy blood flow to the lips, which can help to fade discoloration and even out skin tone. Regular consumption of rosemary tea may also help to stimulate collagen production and improve overall skin health, leaving lips looking smoother and more radiant. This natural rem...
